Package com.example.persistence.Impl

Class ProfileDAOImpl

      public Profile updateById(Profile profile, UUID id)
      Description copied from interface: IGenericDAO
      Updates an entity by its identifier.
      Specified by:
      updateById in interface IGenericDAO<Profile,UUID>
      Parameters:
      profile - The updated entity data - must not be null.
      id - The identifier of the entity to update - must not be null.
      Returns:
      The updated entity.

    • existsByUniqueProperties

      public boolean existsByUniqueProperties(Profile profile)
      Description copied from interface: IGenericDAO
      Checks if an entity exists based on its unique properties.
      Specified by:
      existsByUniqueProperties in interface IGenericDAO<Profile,UUID>
      Parameters:
      profile - The entity containing unique properties to check - must not be null.
      Returns:
      true if an entity with the same unique properties exists, otherwise false.
